name: BEC World Public Company Limited
summary: BEC World Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the entertainment and recreation business in Thailand and the Republic of the Union of Myanmar. The company operates television (TV) and radio stations; provides and produces TV, radio, and news programs; sells air time for advertising; and owns and leases various assets. It also provides information technology and maintenance services; retails computer accessories; and invests in digital platform, including internet and phone related businesses. In addition, the company engages in the digital TV station business. BEC World Public Company Limited was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
